short_title: WorktreeCreate hook breaks Agent worktree isolation
alignment_rationale: pilot-derived (rc.21, exact error text + hooks.json quoted); shipped dispatcher claims WorktreeCreate authority then returns no path, disabling isolation:worktree for every agent in every factory project
quick_win_disqualification: binary dispatcher fix + platform-contract decision (emit path vs decline event), not a bounded one-liner
cited_evidence: error string verbatim; hooks.json registration quoted; impact enumerated for all Agent isolation:worktree calls

short_title: Adversary sweep must span spec+VP artifacts
alignment_rationale: self_referential engine-hardening; pilot-derived from akey STORY-018 passes 6-9 (F-P9-1 VP-020 stale blockquote cited)
cited_evidence: akey STORY-018 P6-P9, F-P9-1/F-P9-2 findings quoted

alignment_rationale: successor to #504; P10 spec-to-story drift instance cited (STORY-018 Step 3 pseudocode stale)
successor to #505; P11 found BC's own trace tables stale after downstream fixes; supersession table in body
the generalization terminus of the #504-#507 chain: cohort-wide sweep when applying any prose fix; three instances P12-P14 cited; 14-pass convergence cost quantified

short_title: cp -r of worktree silently poisons shared .git/config
alignment_rationale: silent cross-boundary config mutation: scratch-repo experiment disabled commit.gpgsign + reset identity in the REAL shared repo unnoticed; worktree .git is a pointer file, cp -r copies the pointer; agents need a scratch-isolation rule (clone, never cp)
quick_win_disqualification: needs an agent-procedure rule + possibly a guard hook; silent-corruption class, not a one-liner
cited_evidence: config keys mutated enumerated (user.email, user.name, commit.gpgsign=false, core.hooksPath unset)

short_title: Verify encoded artifacts in decoded form
alignment_rationale: em-dash JSON-escape instance: grep validated against source JSON instead of decoded command; 5-of-6 tokens matched, the operative sixth did not
cited_evidence: unicode escape vs raw byte instance

alignment_rationale: first external-contributor governance question; proposes artifact-as-issue flow backed by 2000-trial simulation; counterparty (ArcavenAE) waiting on ruling before offering artifact-bearing PRs
cited_evidence: sim tables + census in comments; maintainers subscribed 2026-07-05
attn_why: consent/relationship decision only maintainers can make; external counterparty blocked on the ruling

short_title: Test-assertion content vs BC-prose drift check
alignment_rationale: holdout Pass-2 instance: assertion checks error field while BC prose specifies audit log entry content; P8 checks version strings not assertion semantics
cited_evidence: akey protocol_audit.rs assertion vs BC-2.4.002 AV2 POST-2 prose

short_title: ARCH-11 reverse-trace needs a machine check
alignment_rationale: same finding class recurred 5+ consecutive passes, each costing a full dispatch+remediation burst for one table row; machine-detectable toil

short_title: Green claims need pasted gate evidence
alignment_rationale: false-green class: 2-of-8 stories reported green with failing gates in one wave, caught only by orchestrator luck; per-story-delivery.md has no evidence-paste requirement — converts cheap pre-merge fixes into post-merge investigations
future-proofing from a NO_FINDINGS pass observation; no defect observed yet

short_title: Root-level red-gate log tracked on develop
alignment_rationale: third artifact-containment leak mechanism (after #341 pre-ignore path + #263 gitlink): root-level artifact invisible to path-prefix checks; fix is git rm --cached + relocate; broader content-based guard proposed
cited_evidence: git ls-files output; commit 99d24315 / PR #123; no factory-artifacts counterpart
